## CreateCookieOptions type

Type alias for all the cookie properties defined by [Cookie](./tough-cookie.cookie.md) (except for [Cookie.creationIndex](./tough-cookie.cookie.creationindex.md)<!-- -->).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type CreateCookieOptions = Omit<{
    [K in keyof Cookie as Cookie[K] extends (...args: any[]) => any ? never : K]?: Cookie[K];
}, 'creationIndex'>;
```
